violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager * had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. - At the time of inspection the two listed ServeSafe personnel on the wall are no longer associated with this store. A ServeSafe person is required within 90 days of this inspection.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was left propped open.

General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. - rear Exterior door has an air gap at the bottom that allows for access to insects or pests.
